name: Pac-Man
description: The original arcade score attack. Everyone knows it. Pure skill — highest score wins.

score_p1.notes: P1 score — BCD encoded. Address from MAME memory map / MAME Cheat database.

tournament_modes.name: Score Attack
tournament_modes.description: Highest score when all lives are lost wins.

notes: ⚠️ RAM addresses need verification — Pac-Man arcade RAM map varies by ROM version
ROM: puckman.zip (Japanese original) or pacman.zip (US version) — addresses may differ
MAME cheat XML database is the best source: https://www.mamecheat.co.uk/
FBNeo core handles Pac-Man well — confirmed in libretro-database
Universally recognised — strongest nostalgia factor of any game
